title: Adhesives & Allied Products is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Adhesives & Allied Products is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
We at Adhesives & Allied Products are looking for an experienced Quality Control Engineer based out of Meerut. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Adhesives & Allied Products:
Adhesives & Allied Products is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in FMEA

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Referral bonus program
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual performance appraisal
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Meerut, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Adhesives & Allied Products!
